name: ProtoSection

props.name: connection
props.description: The live Connection record (connectionDetails plus connection state) this section renders controls for; reactively bound so switch/dir/rule-list state track the connections and proto-state stores.

notes: Wiring component: owns proto-state store reads, connections.updateConnectionDetails calls, proto import/re-import/remove actions, and rule CRUD/reorder/test bindings, then passes props to ProtoBindingRulesForm. .proto files are imported (copied into the app's data folder) via a native folder picker or a browser file upload, never compiled from the picked path directly. Renders last in ConnectionDetailsDialog, after SubscriptionsForm. Figma is not linked yet; this story uses local Storybook fixtures.
